comment: Centralized list of banks in Thailand.
Broker markup configuration per currency. Added to bot_rate before calculating offer_rate.
BOT reference exchange rates. Updated by external cronjob. Used to calculate bot_rate for deposit requests.
Tracks user role upgrades (Trader→IB, IB→MIB, etc.) for audit trail.
All Trading Account operations: PSP deposits/withdrawals to MT5, trades (profit/loss/spread/commission/swap), internal transfers involving MT5, liquidations, rebalances.
Mapping between banks and specific codes required by PSP providers.
PSP provider configuration. Stores fee rate used during deposit rate calculation.
Immutable records of rebate accrued per deal per beneficiary level. Status transitions: PENDING → SETTLED.
Immutable ledger of rebate distributions per trade per beneficiary level.
Running total of lifetime rebate earnings per IB user. Only increments, never decreases.
Immutable rebate transaction log. Linked to wallet_transactions via transaction_id. Never update or delete.
Rebate distribution lines. Created eagerly on user registration via referral link. Format: [IB CID|LINK-ID|Executor CID]
Max rebate cap per lot for each account_group × symbol target combination. Used to validate SUM(all_levels) <= max_cap.
Rebate rate matrix. Each row = 1 rate for 1 account_group × 1 symbol target × 1 level. Supports 3-layer resolution: SYMBOL_GROUP → SYMBOL_CUSTOM_GROUP → SYMBOL (most-specific-wins).
Rebate scheme configurations. Templates have is_template=true and are not linked to any rebate line.
Batch settlement records that group rebate accruals and credit wallets periodically.
Maps individual MT5 symbols to custom symbol groups. Each symbol belongs to exactly one custom group.
Custom symbol sub-groups under symbol groups (e.g. Major FX, Minor FX under FX)
Default and custom symbol groups for rebate scheme configuration (e.g. FX, Commodities, Indices, Shares, Cryptocurrencies)
Maps MT5 symbols to default symbol groups. Used during rebate calculation to resolve symbol → group.
Strictly audited child table storing immutable FX rates and PSP specific metadata without relying on JSONB for business logic.
DEPRECATED — migrated to mt5_account_transactions and wallet_transactions. Kept for backward compatibility during transition.

Platform-agnostic view of closed (realized) trades. Source: mt5_deals, joining IN deals (entry=0) with OUT deals (entry=1/2/3) on the same position_id. Each row represents one realized P&L event. Filter by user_id, ORDER BY close_time DESC for pagination. Partial closes produce separate rows with their own P&L. When cTrader is added, this view will become a UNION ALL across platforms.

Platform-agnostic view of currently open trading positions. Source: mt5_positions. Designed for paginated frontend lists. Filter by user_id, ORDER BY open_time DESC for pagination. When cTrader is added, this view will become a UNION ALL across platforms.
Unified immutable ledger of all wallet movements: rebate distributions, PSP deposits/withdrawals, internal transfers, manual adjustments. Never update or delete rows.
User wallets. Each user gets DEFAULT wallet on registration. IB wallet created on IB/MIB upgrade.
